title: Iran attacks on crucial Saudi pipeline and production facilities slash kingdom's oil output
summary_full: The damage to Saudi infrastructure will only compound the disruption to global oil supplies trigged by Iran's attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: The damage to Saudi infrastructure will only compound the disruption to global oil supplies trigged by Iran's attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
